title: NoElytraBoost
description: Plugin that prevents firework rocket boosting while gliding with elytra.
body:
NoElytraBoost is a simple Paper plugin that prevents players from using firework rockets to boost their speed while gliding with an elytra. 

**Perfect for servers that want to balance elytra flight!** Players can still glide normally with their elytra, but the powerful rocket boost is completely disabled. This makes elytra travel more balanced and prevents players from flying across entire maps in seconds.

**Key Features:**
- Automatically blocks firework rocket boost while gliding
- Works immediately after installation - no configuration needed
- Players keep their rockets, they just can't use them for boosting
- Zero impact on server performance
- Compatible with Paper 1.21.10 and newer versions

Simply install the plugin and restart your server. When players try to use a firework rocket while gliding with an elytra, the boost will be prevented. Normal elytra gliding still works perfectly - players can still fly, they just can't use rockets to gain massive speed boosts.

This plugin is ideal for survival servers, PvP servers, or any server where you want to keep elytra flight balanced and prevent players from traveling too quickly across your world.
